subcategory: image gallery accordion with hover expansion
use_cases: Image portfolio showcase with interactive hover-based expansion
Product gallery displaying multiple images with one highlighted on hover
Visual content browser for media-rich landing pages
Photo collection display with smooth accordion transitions
Creative showcase grid with immersive hover experience
ai_summary: An interactive image gallery component featuring accordion-style expansion where cards grow from compact (5rem) to expanded (24rem) width on hover. Built with React state management and smooth 500ms CSS transitions, this minimalist component displays up to 9 images in a horizontal flex layout with a neutral backdrop. Ideal for media portfolios, product showcases, and creative galleries requiring immersive visual browsing on desktop platforms.
